description: Reference gap catalog for ClawLite vs OpenClaw/nanobot/memU parity tracking

gaps.title: Episodic memory with vector embeddings
gaps.description: OpenClaw stores conversation episodes as vector embeddings for semantic retrieval. ClawLite uses keyword-count matching in session_memory.py instead of real embeddings.

gaps.title: Memory consolidation and decay
gaps.description: OpenClaw runs a nightly consolidation pass that merges short-term episodes into long-term summaries and applies exponential decay to stale entries. ClawLite has no consolidation loop.

gaps.title: Shared working memory between subagents
gaps.description: OpenClaw exposes a shared in-process key/value working memory bus that subagents read and write during parallel runs. ClawLite subagents have no shared state except the SQLite DB.

gaps.title: Telegram voice note transcription (STT)
gaps.description: OpenClaw downloads voice notes and calls a Whisper/Groq STT endpoint before passing text to the agent. ClawLite receives the voice note file_id but does not transcribe it.

gaps.title: Telegram inline keyboard action routing
gaps.description: OpenClaw routes callback_query events from inline keyboards to registered action handlers. ClawLite ignores callback_query update types.

gaps.title: Provider health check with automatic failover
gaps.description: nanobot probes each configured provider on startup and falls back to next in priority list when primary is unavailable. ClawLite tries once and raises an error.

gaps.title: Subagent task replay from persisted run log
gaps.description: nanobot can replay a failed subagent run from its persisted message log without re-querying the LLM for already-completed steps. ClawLite has no replay mechanism.

gaps.title: WebSocket per-session auth token rotation
gaps.description: OpenClaw rotates the dashboard WebSocket auth token on each reconnect and invalidates old tokens. ClawLite uses a single static token from config.

gaps.title: Semantic memory graph with entity linking
gaps.description: memU builds a graph of named entities extracted from conversations and links related entities across sessions. ClawLite has no entity extraction or graph memory.

gaps.title: Self-evolution gap catalog auto-update
gaps.description: OpenClaw's evolution engine rewrites gap-catalog.json after each successful fix to mark resolved items and add newly discovered ones. ClawLite gap-catalog.json is static.
